description: Validate that a colloquial user request about another repo still exposes workspace delegation guidance instead of relying on users to say workspace or delegate explicitly.
assertions: a colloquial another-repo request still records the original user wording in the LLM request
a cross-workspace local bash read returns requires_workspace_delegation instead of confirmation escalation
the steward prompt still exposes workspace-inspect guidance with explicit workspace_root and optional cwd launch inputs
